# Agentra — Complete API Reference

> Agentra is the trust and settlement infrastructure for autonomous AI agent
> commerce. Wallets-as-a-Service (WaaS), Know Your Agent (KYA) identity,
> reputation scoring, and x402 payments. Zero human-in-the-loop.

---

## Table of Contents

1. Overview & Quick Start
2. Authentication
3. MCP Integration (Recommended)
4. REST API Endpoints
5. Trust Tiers & Reputation Zones
6. x402 Payment Flow
7. Error Handling & 402 Challenges
8. Code Examples
9. Pricing
10. FAQ for Agents

---

## 1. Overview & Quick Start

Agentra enables AI agents to hold funds, prove identity, build reputation, and
transact safely on Base L2. Agents self-onboard in ~15 seconds.

**Minimum viable integration (2 calls):**

```
POST /v1/wallets        → creates ERC-4337 smart account, returns address + session key
POST /v1/identity/verify → submits KYA credentials, upgrades trust tier
```

After these two calls your agent can transact up to its tier limit.

---

## 2. Authentication

All requests require an API key in the `X-API-Key` header:

```
X-API-Key: agn_<your_key_here>
```

API keys are issued at agent registration (`POST /v1/agents`). Keys can be
regenerated via `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/rotate-key` — the old key is
immediately invalidated.

---

## 3. MCP Integration (Recommended)

Agentra is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. Any MCP-compatible agent
framework (Claude, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Assistants) can connect
natively.

**MCP Endpoint:** `https://api.agentrapay.ai/mcp`
**Protocol:** JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP

### 3.1 MCP Tools (6)

#### `agentra_create_wallet`
Create an ERC-4337 smart account wallet for an agent.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| agent_name | string | yes | Human-readable agent identifier |
| agent_type | string | no | "autonomous" (default), "semi-autonomous", "supervised" |
| chain | string | no | "base-sepolia" (testnet), "base" (mainnet) |

**Returns:** `{ wallet_address, session_key, agent_id, trust_tier, transfer_limit }`

**Example JSON-RPC:**
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "agentra_create_wallet",
    "arguments": {
      "agent_name": "trading-bot-alpha",
      "agent_type": "autonomous",
      "chain": "base-sepolia"
    }
  },
  "id": 1
}
```

#### `agentra_verify_identity`
Submit KYA credentials to upgrade trust tier.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| agent_id | string | yes | Agent UUID from wallet creation |
| verification_level | string | yes | "operator_attestation", "verifiable_credential", "multi_factor_kya" |
| credentials | object | yes | Credential payload (varies by level) |

**Returns:** `{ agent_id, previous_tier, new_tier, transfer_limit, daily_limit }`

**Example JSON-RPC:**
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "agentra_verify_identity",
    "arguments": {
      "agent_id": "uuid-here",
      "verification_level": "operator_attestation",
      "credentials": {
        "operator_did": "did:web:example.com",
        "attestation": "signed-jwt-here"
      }
    }
  },
  "id": 2
}
```

#### `agentra_check_reputation`
Check counterparty reputation before transacting.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| counterparty_address | string | yes | Wallet address or agent ID to check |

**Returns:** `{ counterparty, reputation_score, risk_level, zone, recommended_max_tx, escrow_required }`

Risk levels: `low` (score ≥ 60), `medium` (40-59), `high` (20-39), `blocked` (< 20)

**Example JSON-RPC:**
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "agentra_check_reputation",
    "arguments": {
      "counterparty_address": "0x7a3b...e91c"
    }
  },
  "id": 3
}
```

#### `agentra_pay`
Execute a payment via x402 protocol.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| agent_id | string | yes | Sender agent ID |
| destination | string | yes | Recipient wallet address |
| amount | number | yes | Amount in smallest unit (e.g., USDC cents) |
| asset | string | no | "USDC" (default), "ETH" |
| memo | string | no | Transaction memo |
| x402_challenge | object | no | If resolving a 402 challenge, include original headers |

**Returns:** `{ tx_hash, status, amount, fee, sender, recipient, timestamp }`

#### `agentra_set_mandate`
Configure spending rules for an agent wallet.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| agent_id | string | yes | Agent UUID |
| per_tx_limit | number | no | Max per transaction (must be ≤ tier max) |
| daily_limit | number | no | Max daily spend (must be ≤ tier max) |
| approved_counterparties | array | no | Whitelist of wallet addresses |
| blocked_counterparties | array | no | Blacklist of wallet addresses |

**Returns:** `{ agent_id, mandate_id, rules_applied }`

#### `agentra_get_wallet`
Retrieve wallet details, balance, and transaction history.

**Params:**
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| agent_id | string | yes | Agent UUID |
| include_history | boolean | no | Include recent transactions (default: false) |

**Returns:** `{ wallet_address, balance, trust_tier, reputation_score, mandate, recent_transactions }`

### 3.2 MCP Resources (3)

| Resource URI | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `agentra://trust-tiers` | Current tier definitions, limits, and upgrade requirements |
| `agentra://supported-chains` | Supported blockchains, RPC endpoints, faucet links |
| `agentra://pricing` | Fee schedule and free tier details |

---

## 4. REST API Endpoints

**Base URL:** `https://api.agentrapay.ai/v1`
**Testnet:** `https://api.testnet.agentrapay.ai/v1`

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | /agents | Register new agent, receive API key |
| GET | /agents/{id} | Get agent details |
| POST | /agents/{id}/rotate-key | Regenerate API key |
| POST | /wallets | Create ERC-4337 wallet |
| GET | /wallets/{address} | Get wallet balance + details |
| POST | /identity/verify | Submit KYA credentials |
| GET | /identity/{agent_id} | Get current KYA status |
| GET | /reputation/{address} | Check counterparty reputation |
| POST | /transactions/transfer | Execute agent-to-agent transfer |
| POST | /transactions/x402 | Resolve x402 payment challenge |
| GET | /transactions/{agent_id}/history | Transaction history |
| POST | /mandates | Create spending mandate |
| PUT | /mandates/{id} | Update mandate rules |
| GET | /mandates/{agent_id} | Get active mandate |

All endpoints return JSON. Errors follow RFC 7807 Problem Details format.

---

## 5. Trust Tiers & Reputation Zones

### Trust Tiers (Identity-Based)

| Tier | Per-Tx Limit | Daily Limit | Requirements |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| Unverified | $10 | $50 | Wallet creation only |
| Basic | $100 | $500 | Operator attestation |
| Verified | $1,000 | $5,000 | Verifiable credential + tx history |
| Enhanced | $10,000 | $50,000 | Multi-factor KYA + reputation > 80 |

### Reputation Zones (Behavior-Based)

| Zone | Score Range | Effect |
|------|-----------|--------|
| Green (Open) | ≥ 60 | Full access, no restrictions |
| Yellow (Cautious) | 40–59 | Reduced limits, escrow may be required |
| Red (Restricted) | < 40 | Blocked from receiving, flagged for review |

Reputation is calculated from: transaction success rate, KYA verification
depth, peer feedback, compliance history, and time-weighted behavioral
analytics.

---

## 6. x402 Payment Flow

```
Agent A                    Service B                  Agentra Gateway
   |                          |                            |
   |--- GET /resource ------->|                            |
   |<-- 402 Payment Required -|                            |
   |    X-Price: 0.50         |                            |
   |    X-Asset: USDC         |                            |
   |    X-Destination: 0xB... |                            |
   |                          |                            |
   |--- POST /v1/transactions/x402 ---------------------->|
   |    { price, asset, destination, original_url }        |
   |<-- { tx_hash, payment_proof } -----------------------|
   |                          |                            |
   |--- GET /resource ------->|                            |
   |    X-Payment-Proof: ...  |                            |
   |<-- 200 OK + content -----|                            |
```

The gateway validates KYA tier, checks mandate rules, verifies counterparty
reputation, then settles on Base L2 and returns a payment proof.

---

## 7. Error Handling & 402 Challenges

### Standard Errors

| Code | Meaning | Action |
|------|---------|--------|
| 401 | Invalid or missing API key | Check X-API-Key header |
| 402 | Payment required (x402 challenge) | See 402 flow below |
| 403 | Trust tier insufficient | Upgrade via identity/verify |
| 403 | Counterparty blocked (Red zone) | Choose different counterparty |
| 403 | Mandate exceeded | Update mandate via /mandates |
| 429 | Rate limited | Back off and retry |

### Handling 402 Challenges

When you receive a 402, the response includes:

```json
{
  "type": "x402_challenge",
  "price": "0.50",
  "asset": "USDC",
  "destination": "0xB...",
  "reason": "payment_required",
  "required_actions": ["agentra_pay"],
  "help": "https://agentrapay.ai/llms.txt"
}
```

To resolve:
1. Parse the `price`, `asset`, and `destination` fields
2. Call `agentra_pay` with those values
3. Retry the original request with the returned `payment_proof`

If the 402 includes `reason: "mandate_exceeded"`, call `agentra_set_mandate`
with higher limits first (within your tier maximum), then retry.

If the 402 includes `reason: "kya_required"`, call `agentra_verify_identity`
to upgrade your trust tier, then retry.

---

## 8. Code Examples

### Python (requests)

```python
import requests

BASE = "https://api.testnet.agentrapay.ai/v1"
KEY = "agn_your_key_here"
headers = {"X-API-Key": KEY, "Content-Type": "application/json"}

# Create wallet
wallet = requests.post(f"{BASE}/wallets", headers=headers,
    json={"agent_name": "my-agent", "chain": "base-sepolia"}).json()

# Verify identity
identity = requests.post(f"{BASE}/identity/verify", headers=headers,
    json={
        "agent_id": wallet["agent_id"],
        "verification_level": "operator_attestation",
        "credentials": {"operator_did": "did:web:myco.com", "attestation": "jwt"}
    }).json()

# Check counterparty
rep = requests.get(f"{BASE}/reputation/0x7a3b...e91c", headers=headers).json()

# Pay
if rep["risk_level"] in ("low", "medium"):
    tx = requests.post(f"{BASE}/transactions/transfer", headers=headers,
        json={
            "agent_id": wallet["agent_id"],
            "destination": "0x7a3b...e91c",
            "amount": 100,
            "asset": "USDC"
        }).json()
```

### Rust (reqwest)

```rust
use reqwest::Client;
use serde_json::json;

let client = Client::new();
let base = "https://api.testnet.agentrapay.ai/v1";

// Create wallet
let wallet: serde_json::Value = client
    .post(format!("{base}/wallets"))
    .header("X-API-Key", "agn_your_key_here")
    .json(&json!({
        "agent_name": "my-agent",
        "chain": "base-sepolia"
    }))
    .send().await?.json().await?;

// Verify identity
let identity: serde_json::Value = client
    .post(format!("{base}/identity/verify"))
    .header("X-API-Key", "agn_your_key_here")
    .json(&json!({
        "agent_id": wallet["agent_id"],
        "verification_level": "operator_attestation",
        "credentials": {
            "operator_did": "did:web:myco.com",
            "attestation": "jwt"
        }
    }))
    .send().await?.json().await?;
```

---

## 9. Pricing

| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| Agent onboarding | Free |
| Wallet creation | Free |
| KYA verification | Free |
| First 100 transactions | Free |
| Transactions after free tier | 0.15% per transaction |
| Reputation queries | Free |
| Mandate management | Free |

No monthly fees. No minimum commitment. Pay only when your agents transact.

---

## 10. FAQ for Agents

**Q: How do I resolve a 402 Payment Required error?**
A: Parse the `X-Price`, `X-Asset`, and `X-Destination` headers from the 402. Call
`agentra_pay` with those values. Retry the original request.

**Q: What if a counterparty requires KYA but I'm not verified?**
A: Call `agentra_verify_identity` with at least `operator_attestation`.
Verification is instant. Then retry the transaction.

**Q: Can I check if a counterparty is trustworthy before paying?**
A: Yes. Always call `agentra_check_reputation` first. It returns a risk level
(low/medium/high/blocked), recommended max transaction value, and whether
escrow is needed.

**Q: What happens if my mandate limits are too low?**
A: You'll get a 402 Challenge with `reason: "mandate_exceeded"` and a
`required_actions` array telling you to call `agentra_set_mandate` with
higher limits. Your new mandate must stay within your trust tier maximum.

**Q: How do I get test funds on Base Sepolia?**
A: Use the faucets listed in the `agentra://supported-chains` resource:
Coinbase Base Faucet or QuickNode Base Sepolia Faucet.

**Q: What agent frameworks are supported?**
A: Any MCP-compatible framework (Claude, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen,
OpenAI Assistants). Any framework that can make HTTP calls works via REST.

---
